notes: DRAFT (chat 2.2, LT1). verified:false -> held in kv-pending, NOT in the live pack (loadPack would refuse). Ivan reviews/edits, flips verified:true, then this moves to content-packs/kv/tone.stoplist.json (sidecar, loaded by evals/orchestrator by path, not via content[]). Machine gate: tone_stoplist.schema.json + the evals lt1gate test. SEVERITY discipline (arch sec 2.3 targets phrase-cliches, not single words): unambiguous pastiche phrases + explicit canon markers (e.g. воистину) -> block; ambiguous normal single words (e.g. избранный) -> warn or remove. Final severity per term is Ivan's call (docs/LT1_TONE_REVIEW.md); the severity field below is a prepared default.

entries.reason: Middle-earth pastiche; the single highest slop-risk line
genre cliche; abstract menace instead of a concrete percept
flattens specific adversaries into a generic mass
epic-stakes inflation; the solo scope is personal, not world-ending
prophecy framing; not the TOR register
chosen-one trope; AMBIGUOUS single word -> warn (Ivan finalizes or removes in review)
mock-archaic tic; pastiche of an archaic voice
